Enumeration Case# SFLT_PROG

macOS 10.12+

```
SFLT_PROG = 0x02
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1645970-anonymous/sflt_prog#discussion)

Indicates this socket filter should be attached only when request by the application using the SO_NKE socket option.
